content.full_text:
January 5, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 'J' Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Sirs;

I would like a written opinion regarding this question as soon as possible:

Is it permissible for a general purpose recipient committee (i.e. a committee not controlled by any candidate or office holder) to make independent expenditures in a campaign where one or more of the candidates may have in the past assisted the committee in its fundraising?

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,

Allison Turner
